title: National Nuclear Security Administration (NNSA) FY2027 Budget and Policy Issues: In Brief

title: The Moon as a Test Case for Coercion Theory: US Interests in a New Space Race
summary: China aims to land taikonauts on the Moon before 2030—before the US returns to the lunar surface—and set the operating rules that will govern future lunar activity. Traditional deterrence won’t work in a domain where the US is unable to project military force, and space treaties lack enforcement. title: 'The Trojan Teddy Bear': The promise and peril of childhood in the age of AI
summary: AI is moving beyond chatbots and into toys, dolls, and robots built to befriend children. A leading child-development expert says the technology offers real promise — but also risks crowding out the human relationships children need most.

title: Lindsey Graham's career and influence on American politics
